title: Short options
body:
Short options!
    
Any subcommand that has two or more booleon short options can
now combine those two options.  For example:
    
kpod rmi -af (Remove all images forceably)

comments.body: looks like kpod_run.bats line 80 isn't happy.  Output may have changed from BAR?

:pushpin: Commit 23a0c93 has been approved by `rhatdan`
